title: Blank Space
why_this_song: Blank Space by Taylor Swift (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "So it's gonna be forever"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You can tell me when it's over, mm"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "They'll tell you I'm insane"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "'Cause you know I love the players"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Got a long list of ex-lovers"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Got a long list of ex-lovers

I could show you incredible things
Saw you there and I thought
"Oh, my God, look at that face

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tell" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tell" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Nice to meet you, where you been?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I could show you incredible things
But I've got a blank space, baby

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Blank Space" was released in 2014. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Blank Space" foi lançada em 2014. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Blank Space" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Blank Space" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
